changeSet.author: arkcase.container
changeSet.sql:
IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM dbo.sysobjects WHERE id = OBJECT_ID(N'[dbo].[FK_QRTZ6_TRIGGERS_QRTZ6_JOB_DETAILS]') AND OBJECTPROPERTY(id, N'ISFOREIGNKEY') = 1) ALTER TABLE [dbo].[QRTZ6_TRIGGERS] DROP CONSTRAINT FK_QRTZ6_TRIGGERS_QRTZ6_JOB_DETAILS GO
IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM dbo.sysobjects WHERE id = OBJECT_ID(N'[dbo].[FK_QRTZ6_CRON_TRIGGERS_QRTZ6_TRIGGERS]') AND OBJECTPROPERTY(id, N'ISFOREIGNKEY') = 1) ALTER TABLE [dbo].[QRTZ6_CRON_TRIGGERS] DROP CONSTRAINT FK_QRTZ6_CRON_TRIGGERS_QRTZ6_TRIGGERS GO
IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM dbo.sysobjects WHERE id = OBJECT_ID(N'[dbo].[FK_QRTZ6_SIMPLE_TRIGGERS_QRTZ6_TRIGGERS]') AND OBJECTPROPERTY(id, N'ISFOREIGNKEY') = 1) ALTER TABLE [dbo].[QRTZ6_SIMPLE_TRIGGERS] DROP CONSTRAINT FK_QRTZ6_SIMPLE_TRIGGERS_QRTZ6_TRIGGERS GO
IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM dbo.sysobjects WHERE id = OBJECT_ID(N'[dbo].[FK_QRTZ6_SIMPROP_TRIGGERS_QRTZ6_TRIGGERS]') AND OBJECTPROPERTY(id, N'ISFOREIGNKEY') = 1) ALTER TABLE [dbo].[QRTZ6_SIMPROP_TRIGGERS] DROP CONSTRAINT FK_QRTZ6_SIMPROP_TRIGGERS_QRTZ6_TRIGGERS GO
IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM dbo.sysobjects WHERE id = OBJECT_ID(N'[dbo].[FK_QRTZ6_BLOB_TRIGGERS_QRTZ6_TRIGGERS]') AND OBJECTPROPERTY(id, N'ISFOREIGNKEY') = 1) ALTER TABLE [dbo].[QRTZ6_BLOB_TRIGGERS] DROP CONSTRAINT FK_QRTZ6_BLOB_TRIGGERS_QRTZ6_TRIGGERS GO
IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM dbo.sysobjects WHERE id = OBJECT_ID(N'[dbo].[QRTZ6_CALENDARS]') AND OBJECTPROPERTY(id, N'ISUSERTABLE') = 1) DROP TABLE [dbo].[QRTZ6_CALENDARS] GO
IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM dbo.sysobjects WHERE id = OBJECT_ID(N'[dbo].[QRTZ6_CRON_TRIGGERS]') AND OBJECTPROPERTY(id, N'ISUSERTABLE') = 1) DROP TABLE [dbo].[QRTZ6_CRON_TRIGGERS] GO
IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM dbo.sysobjects WHERE id = OBJECT_ID(N'[dbo].[QRTZ6_BLOB_TRIGGERS]') AND OBJECTPROPERTY(id, N'ISUSERTABLE') = 1) DROP TABLE [dbo].[QRTZ6_BLOB_TRIGGERS] GO
IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM dbo.sysobjects WHERE id = OBJECT_ID(N'[dbo].[QRTZ6_FIRED_TRIGGERS]') AND OBJECTPROPERTY(id, N'ISUSERTABLE') = 1) DROP TABLE [dbo].[QRTZ6_FIRED_TRIGGERS] GO
IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM dbo.sysobjects WHERE id = OBJECT_ID(N'[dbo].[QRTZ6_PAUSED_TRIGGER_GRPS]') AND OBJECTPROPERTY(id, N'ISUSERTABLE') = 1) DROP TABLE [dbo].[QRTZ6_PAUSED_TRIGGER_GRPS] GO
IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM dbo.sysobjects WHERE id = OBJECT_ID(N'[dbo].[QRTZ6_SCHEDULER_STATE]') AND OBJECTPROPERTY(id, N'ISUSERTABLE') = 1) DROP TABLE [dbo].[QRTZ6_SCHEDULER_STATE] GO
IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM dbo.sysobjects WHERE id = OBJECT_ID(N'[dbo].[QRTZ6_LOCKS]') AND OBJECTPROPERTY(id, N'ISUSERTABLE') = 1) DROP TABLE [dbo].[QRTZ6_LOCKS] GO
IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM dbo.sysobjects WHERE id = OBJECT_ID(N'[dbo].[QRTZ6_JOB_DETAILS]') AND OBJECTPROPERTY(id, N'ISUSERTABLE') = 1) DROP TABLE [dbo].[QRTZ6_JOB_DETAILS] GO
IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM dbo.sysobjects WHERE id = OBJECT_ID(N'[dbo].[QRTZ6_SIMPLE_TRIGGERS]') AND OBJECTPROPERTY(id, N'ISUSERTABLE') = 1) DROP TABLE [dbo].[QRTZ6_SIMPLE_TRIGGERS] GO
IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM dbo.sysobjects WHERE id = OBJECT_ID(N'[dbo].[QRTZ6_SIMPROP_TRIGGERS]') AND OBJECTPROPERTY(id, N'ISUSERTABLE') = 1) DROP TABLE [dbo].[QRTZ6_SIMPROP_TRIGGERS] GO
IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM dbo.sysobjects WHERE id = OBJECT_ID(N'[dbo].[QRTZ6_TRIGGERS]') AND OBJECTPROPERTY(id, N'ISUSERTABLE') = 1) DROP TABLE [dbo].[QRTZ6_TRIGGERS] GO
CREATE TABLE [dbo].[QRTZ6_CALENDARS] ( [SCHED_NAME] [VARCHAR] (120) NOT NULL , [CALENDAR_NAME] [VARCHAR] (200) NOT NULL , [CALENDAR] [IMAGE] NOT NULL ) ON [PRIMARY] GO
CREATE TABLE [dbo].[QRTZ6_CRON_TRIGGERS] ( [SCHED_NAME] [VARCHAR] (120) NOT NULL , [TRIGGER_NAME] [VARCHAR] (200) NOT NULL , [TRIGGER_GROUP] [VARCHAR] (200) NOT NULL , [CRON_EXPRESSION] [VARCHAR] (120) NOT NULL , [TIME_ZONE_ID] [VARCHAR] (80) ) ON [PRIMARY] GO
CREATE TABLE [dbo].[QRTZ6_FIRED_TRIGGERS] ( [SCHED_NAME] [VARCHAR] (120) NOT NULL , [ENTRY_ID] [VARCHAR] (95) NOT NULL , [TRIGGER_NAME] [VARCHAR] (200) NOT NULL , [TRIGGER_GROUP] [VARCHAR] (200) NOT NULL , [INSTANCE_NAME] [VARCHAR] (200) NOT NULL , [FIRED_TIME] [BIGINT] NOT NULL , [SCHED_TIME] [BIGINT] NOT NULL , [PRIORITY] [INTEGER] NOT NULL , [STATE] [VARCHAR] (16) NOT NULL, [JOB_NAME] [VARCHAR] (200) NULL , [JOB_GROUP] [VARCHAR] (200) NULL , [IS_NONCONCURRENT] [VARCHAR] (1) NULL , [REQUESTS_RECOVERY] [VARCHAR] (1) NULL ) ON [PRIMARY] GO
CREATE TABLE [dbo].[QRTZ6_PAUSED_TRIGGER_GRPS] ( [SCHED_NAME] [VARCHAR] (120) NOT NULL , [TRIGGER_GROUP] [VARCHAR] (200) NOT NULL ) ON [PRIMARY] GO
CREATE TABLE [dbo].[QRTZ6_SCHEDULER_STATE] ( [SCHED_NAME] [VARCHAR] (120) NOT NULL , [INSTANCE_NAME] [VARCHAR] (200) NOT NULL , [LAST_CHECKIN_TIME] [BIGINT] NOT NULL , [CHECKIN_INTERVAL] [BIGINT] NOT NULL ) ON [PRIMARY] GO
CREATE TABLE [dbo].[QRTZ6_LOCKS] ( [SCHED_NAME] [VARCHAR] (120) NOT NULL , [LOCK_NAME] [VARCHAR] (40) NOT NULL ) ON [PRIMARY] GO
CREATE TABLE [dbo].[QRTZ6_JOB_DETAILS] ( [SCHED_NAME] [VARCHAR] (120) NOT NULL , [JOB_NAME] [VARCHAR] (200) NOT NULL , [JOB_GROUP] [VARCHAR] (200) NOT NULL , [DESCRIPTION] [VARCHAR] (250) NULL , [JOB_CLASS_NAME] [VARCHAR] (250) NOT NULL , [IS_DURABLE] [VARCHAR] (1) NOT NULL , [IS_NONCONCURRENT] [VARCHAR] (1) NOT NULL , [IS_UPDATE_DATA] [VARCHAR] (1) NOT NULL , [REQUESTS_RECOVERY] [VARCHAR] (1) NOT NULL , [JOB_DATA] [IMAGE] NULL ) ON [PRIMARY] GO
CREATE TABLE [dbo].[QRTZ6_SIMPLE_TRIGGERS] ( [SCHED_NAME] [VARCHAR] (120) NOT NULL , [TRIGGER_NAME] [VARCHAR] (200) NOT NULL , [TRIGGER_GROUP] [VARCHAR] (200) NOT NULL , [REPEAT_COUNT] [BIGINT] NOT NULL , [REPEAT_INTERVAL] [BIGINT] NOT NULL , [TIMES_TRIGGERED] [BIGINT] NOT NULL ) ON [PRIMARY] GO
CREATE TABLE [dbo].[QRTZ6_SIMPROP_TRIGGERS] ( [SCHED_NAME] [VARCHAR] (120) NOT NULL , [TRIGGER_NAME] [VARCHAR] (200) NOT NULL , [TRIGGER_GROUP] [VARCHAR] (200) NOT NULL , [STR_PROP_1] [VARCHAR] (512) NULL, [STR_PROP_2] [VARCHAR] (512) NULL, [STR_PROP_3] [VARCHAR] (512) NULL, [INT_PROP_1] [INT] NULL, [INT_PROP_2] [INT] NULL, [LONG_PROP_1] [BIGINT] NULL, [LONG_PROP_2] [BIGINT] NULL, [DEC_PROP_1] [NUMERIC] (13,4) NULL, [DEC_PROP_2] [NUMERIC] (13,4) NULL, [BOOL_PROP_1] [VARCHAR] (1) NULL, [BOOL_PROP_2] [VARCHAR] (1) NULL, ) ON [PRIMARY] GO
CREATE TABLE [dbo].[QRTZ6_BLOB_TRIGGERS] ( [SCHED_NAME] [VARCHAR] (120) NOT NULL , [TRIGGER_NAME] [VARCHAR] (200) NOT NULL , [TRIGGER_GROUP] [VARCHAR] (200) NOT NULL , [BLOB_DATA] [IMAGE] NULL ) ON [PRIMARY] GO
CREATE TABLE [dbo].[QRTZ6_TRIGGERS] ( [SCHED_NAME] [VARCHAR] (120) NOT NULL , [TRIGGER_NAME] [VARCHAR] (200) NOT NULL , [TRIGGER_GROUP] [VARCHAR] (200) NOT NULL , [JOB_NAME] [VARCHAR] (200) NOT NULL , [JOB_GROUP] [VARCHAR] (200) NOT NULL , [DESCRIPTION] [VARCHAR] (250) NULL , [NEXT_FIRE_TIME] [BIGINT] NULL , [PREV_FIRE_TIME] [BIGINT] NULL , [PRIORITY] [INTEGER] NULL , [TRIGGER_STATE] [VARCHAR] (16) NOT NULL , [TRIGGER_TYPE] [VARCHAR] (8) NOT NULL , [START_TIME] [BIGINT] NOT NULL , [END_TIME] [BIGINT] NULL , [CALENDAR_NAME] [VARCHAR] (200) NULL , [MISFIRE_INSTR] [SMALLINT] NULL , [JOB_DATA] [IMAGE] NULL ) ON [PRIMARY] GO
ALTER TABLE [dbo].[QRTZ6_CALENDARS] WITH NOCHECK ADD CONSTRAINT [PK_QRTZ6_CALENDARS] PRIMARY KEY CLUSTERED ( [SCHED_NAME], [CALENDAR_NAME] ) ON [PRIMARY] GO
ALTER TABLE [dbo].[QRTZ6_CRON_TRIGGERS] WITH NOCHECK ADD CONSTRAINT [PK_QRTZ6_CRON_TRIGGERS] PRIMARY KEY CLUSTERED ( [SCHED_NAME], [TRIGGER_NAME], [TRIGGER_GROUP] ) ON [PRIMARY] GO
ALTER TABLE [dbo].[QRTZ6_FIRED_TRIGGERS] WITH NOCHECK ADD CONSTRAINT [PK_QRTZ6_FIRED_TRIGGERS] PRIMARY KEY CLUSTERED ( [SCHED_NAME], [ENTRY_ID] ) ON [PRIMARY] GO
ALTER TABLE [dbo].[QRTZ6_PAUSED_TRIGGER_GRPS] WITH NOCHECK ADD CONSTRAINT [PK_QRTZ6_PAUSED_TRIGGER_GRPS] PRIMARY KEY CLUSTERED ( [SCHED_NAME], [TRIGGER_GROUP] ) ON [PRIMARY] GO
ALTER TABLE [dbo].[QRTZ6_SCHEDULER_STATE] WITH NOCHECK ADD CONSTRAINT [PK_QRTZ6_SCHEDULER_STATE] PRIMARY KEY CLUSTERED ( [SCHED_NAME], [INSTANCE_NAME] ) ON [PRIMARY] GO
ALTER TABLE [dbo].[QRTZ6_LOCKS] WITH NOCHECK ADD CONSTRAINT [PK_QRTZ6_LOCKS] PRIMARY KEY CLUSTERED ( [SCHED_NAME], [LOCK_NAME] ) ON [PRIMARY] GO
ALTER TABLE [dbo].[QRTZ6_JOB_DETAILS] WITH NOCHECK ADD CONSTRAINT [PK_QRTZ6_JOB_DETAILS] PRIMARY KEY CLUSTERED ( [SCHED_NAME], [JOB_NAME], [JOB_GROUP] ) ON [PRIMARY] GO
ALTER TABLE [dbo].[QRTZ6_SIMPLE_TRIGGERS] WITH NOCHECK ADD CONSTRAINT [PK_QRTZ6_SIMPLE_TRIGGERS] PRIMARY KEY CLUSTERED ( [SCHED_NAME], [TRIGGER_NAME], [TRIGGER_GROUP] ) ON [PRIMARY] GO
ALTER TABLE [dbo].[QRTZ6_SIMPROP_TRIGGERS] WITH NOCHECK ADD CONSTRAINT [PK_QRTZ6_SIMPROP_TRIGGERS] PRIMARY KEY CLUSTERED ( [SCHED_NAME], [TRIGGER_NAME], [TRIGGER_GROUP] ) ON [PRIMARY] GO
ALTER TABLE [dbo].[QRTZ6_TRIGGERS] WITH NOCHECK ADD CONSTRAINT [PK_QRTZ6_TRIGGERS] PRIMARY KEY CLUSTERED ( [SCHED_NAME], [TRIGGER_NAME], [TRIGGER_GROUP] ) ON [PRIMARY] GO
ALTER TABLE [dbo].[QRTZ6_CRON_TRIGGERS] ADD CONSTRAINT [FK_QRTZ6_CRON_TRIGGERS_QRTZ6_TRIGGERS] FOREIGN KEY ( [SCHED_NAME], [TRIGGER_NAME], [TRIGGER_GROUP] ) REFERENCES [dbo].[QRTZ6_TRIGGERS] ( [SCHED_NAME], [TRIGGER_NAME], [TRIGGER_GROUP] ) ON DELETE CASCADE GO
ALTER TABLE [dbo].[QRTZ6_SIMPLE_TRIGGERS] ADD CONSTRAINT [FK_QRTZ6_SIMPLE_TRIGGERS_QRTZ6_TRIGGERS] FOREIGN KEY ( [SCHED_NAME], [TRIGGER_NAME], [TRIGGER_GROUP] ) REFERENCES [dbo].[QRTZ6_TRIGGERS] ( [SCHED_NAME], [TRIGGER_NAME], [TRIGGER_GROUP] ) ON DELETE CASCADE GO
ALTER TABLE [dbo].[QRTZ6_SIMPROP_TRIGGERS] ADD CONSTRAINT [FK_QRTZ6_SIMPROP_TRIGGERS_QRTZ6_TRIGGERS] FOREIGN KEY ( [SCHED_NAME], [TRIGGER_NAME], [TRIGGER_GROUP] ) REFERENCES [dbo].[QRTZ6_TRIGGERS] ( [SCHED_NAME], [TRIGGER_NAME], [TRIGGER_GROUP] ) ON DELETE CASCADE GO
ALTER TABLE [dbo].[QRTZ6_BLOB_TRIGGERS] ADD CONSTRAINT [FK_QRTZ6_BLOB_TRIGGERS_QRTZ6_TRIGGERS] FOREIGN KEY ( [SCHED_NAME], [TRIGGER_NAME], [TRIGGER_GROUP] ) REFERENCES [dbo].[QRTZ6_TRIGGERS] ( [SCHED_NAME], [TRIGGER_NAME], [TRIGGER_GROUP] ) ON DELETE CASCADE GO
ALTER TABLE [dbo].[QRTZ6_TRIGGERS] ADD CONSTRAINT [FK_QRTZ6_TRIGGERS_QRTZ6_JOB_DETAILS] FOREIGN KEY ( [SCHED_NAME], [JOB_NAME], [JOB_GROUP] ) REFERENCES [dbo].[QRTZ6_JOB_DETAILS] ( [SCHED_NAME], [JOB_NAME], [JOB_GROUP] ) GO
INSERT INTO [dbo].[QRTZ6_LOCKS] VALUES('PentahoQuartzScheduler','TRIGGER_ACCESS'); INSERT INTO [dbo].[QRTZ6_LOCKS] VALUES('PentahoQuartzScheduler','JOB_ACCESS'); INSERT INTO [dbo].[QRTZ6_LOCKS] VALUES('PentahoQuartzScheduler','CALENDAR_ACCESS'); INSERT INTO [dbo].[QRTZ6_LOCKS] VALUES('PentahoQuartzScheduler','STATE_ACCESS'); INSERT INTO [dbo].[QRTZ6_LOCKS] VALUES('PentahoQuartzScheduler','MISFIRE_ACCESS'); GO

changeSet.author: arkcase.container
